> This page will be auto-generated from the config types. For now, see the [full example config](https://github.com/tj-smith47/anodize/blob/main/.anodize.yaml) for a comprehensive reference.

Anodize uses `.anodize.yaml` (or `.anodize.toml`) in your project root. Both formats use the same schema.

See individual documentation pages for field-level details:
- [Build configuration](@/docs/builds/rust.md)
- [Archive configuration](@/docs/packages/archives.md)
- [Checksum configuration](@/docs/packages/checksums.md)
- [Release configuration](@/docs/publish/github.md)
- [Publish configuration](@/docs/publish/crates-io.md)
- [Changelog configuration](@/docs/more/changelog.md)
- [Sign configuration](@/docs/sign/binaries-archives.md)
- [Docker configuration](@/docs/packages/docker.md)
- [Announce configuration](@/docs/announce/discord.md)
